description.en: Northern China's answer to bread: wheat dough steamed instead of baked, so no crust ever forms, just a smooth, cloud-white skin over a springy, faintly sweet crumb. Eaten plain, dipped, or torn open beside saucy braises.
description.de: Nordchinas Antwort auf Brot: Weizenteig wird gedämpft statt gebacken, sodass sich nie eine Kruste bildet – nur eine glatte, wolkenweiße Haut über einer sprungkräftigen, leicht süßen Krume. Pur gegessen, getunkt oder neben Schmorgerichten aufgerissen.
description.es: La respuesta del norte de China al pan: la masa de trigo se cuece al vapor en vez de hornearse, así que nunca forma corteza, solo una piel lisa y blanca como una nube sobre una miga elástica y ligeramente dulce. Se come sola, mojada o junto a guisos.
description.fr: La réponse du nord de la Chine au pain : la pâte de blé est cuite à la vapeur plutôt qu'au four, si bien qu'aucune croûte ne se forme, juste une peau lisse et blanche comme un nuage sur une mie souple et légèrement sucrée. Mangé nature ou en accompagnement.

origin.note: Legend credits Three Kingdoms-era strategist Zhuge Liang with inventing it as a substitute for human sacrifice; the plain steamed bun is northern China's everyday wheat staple, made in ornate shapes for New Year.

keeping.note: Steams back to fluffy from frozen in about 10 minutes; a staple side for saucy northern Chinese dishes.

method.title: Mix
method.summary: Combine flour, yeast, baking powder and sugar, then gradually work in water to a smooth, medium-firm dough.

method.title: Knead
method.summary: Knead until completely smooth, resting partway through if working by hand.

method.title: Shape
method.summary: Divide into six pieces and roll each between your palms into a taut, smooth ball.

method.title: Proof
method.summary: Set the buns in a steamer basket and let them puff for about 30 minutes at room temperature.

method.title: Steam
method.summary: Set the steamer over cold water, bring to a boil, then reduce to medium-low and steam 10-12 minutes.

method.title: Rest before opening
method.summary: Let the buns sit off the heat for a couple of minutes before lifting the lid so they don't collapse in the temperature shock.

source.adaptation: Grams kept as sourced; optional date-topped flower shaping omitted in favor of the plain round bun.
